name: Maya Adeyemi
message: We run a 3-location yoga studio and are evaluating Slotera for our team. Could we set up a short call to discuss volume pricing and onboarding?

name: Theo Kessler
message: Calendar sync drops events when the time zone is GMT+13. Repro steps attached. Happy to share more.

name: Anika Borg
message: Would love a way to charge a refundable deposit at booking and release it after the session.

name: Daniel Ortiz
message: Do you offer a partner programme for booking-page designers?

name: Greta Holm
message: Group session waitlists are great, but could you add auto-promote when a seat opens?

name: Wei Tan
message: Interested in the Custom plan for a 25-person consultancy. What's the rough monthly?
